parameters.query:
SELECT json_build_object(
  'current', (SELECT row_to_json(s) FROM system_health_score s),
  'history_30d', (SELECT json_agg(t.* ORDER BY t.snapshot_at) FROM (
    SELECT snapshot_at, score, color, critical_unresolved, ips_blocked, workflow_errors_24h
      FROM health_score_history
     WHERE snapshot_at > now() - INTERVAL '30 days'
     ORDER BY snapshot_at
  ) t),
  'avg_30d', (SELECT round(avg(score)::numeric, 1) FROM health_score_history WHERE snapshot_at > now() - INTERVAL '30 days'),
  'min_30d', (SELECT min(score) FROM health_score_history WHERE snapshot_at > now() - INTERVAL '30 days'),
  'max_30d', (SELECT max(score) FROM health_score_history WHERE snapshot_at > now() - INTERVAL '30 days'),
  'days_red_30d', (SELECT count(*) FROM health_score_history WHERE snapshot_at > now() - INTERVAL '30 days' AND color='red'),
  'days_yellow_30d', (SELECT count(*) FROM health_score_history WHERE snapshot_at > now() - INTERVAL '30 days' AND color='yellow')
) AS report;
